items.title: 主线结论（系统版｜条件触发）
items.summary:
- 主导因子：10年期利率 + 原油价格/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10年期利率（方向/拐点）｜美元指数（强弱）｜VIX指标（是否抬升）｜原油价格/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10年期利率上升→NQ/ES承压更明显；美元指数上升→黄金价格更易回撤；VIX指标上升→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10年期利率继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、黄金价格偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10年期利率回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、黄金价格喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件
items.summary_en:
- 主导因子：10Y/利率 + 原油/风险事件
- 四件套监控：10Y（方向/拐点）｜DXY（强弱）｜VIX（是否抬升）｜原油/风险事件（是否升级）
- 跨资产联动：10Y↑→NQ/ES承压更明显；DXY↑→GC更易回撤；VIX↑→盘中更易急拉急杀/假突破
- 未来90分钟关键窗口：关注是否临近数据/讲话/美债拍卖/开盘等事件窗；事件前后避免追单
- 情景A：若10Y继续上行且VIX抬升→偏NQ/ES先空后看、GC偏弱震荡；操作偏好：等确认后顺势
- 情景B：若10Y回落且VIX回落→偏NQ/ES修复反弹、GC喘息；操作偏好：回踩参与、避免追高
- 期权：事件密度高→偏买波动/带保护；事件窗过去且VIX回落→再考虑卖波动
- ——
- 地缘/避险线索：Stock Market Today, March 24: Oil, AI, and Private Credit Fears Weigh on…
- 宏观/Fed线索：Solmate Reports $129 Million Treasury, Continues Shift to Solana…

items.title: 韩国将投资1660万美元在AI芯片初创公司Rebellions
items.title_en: South Korea to invest $166 million in AI chip startup Rebellions

items.title: 谷歌印度法律顾问突然离职，据说这是公司面临监管障碍的最新一例。
items.title_en: Google top India counsel quits in latest departure amid regulatory hurdles, sources say

items.title: 微星的股票正在下跌。谷歌是否部分负责？
items.summary: 谷歌推出了一个算法，称其改进了人工智能模型的内存使用。是否会实际削弱Micron和其他竞争对手的业务尚不清楚。
items.title_en: Micron’s stock is dropping. Is Google partly to blame?
items.summary_en: Google introduced an algorithm that it says improves memory usage in AI models. Whether that will actually eat into business for Micron and rivals is unclear.

items.title: Arm的股票价格飞速上涨，创下一年来最好的交易日，似乎Arm正经历着与Nvidia类似的转折点。
items.summary: 分析师称，Arm有可能像Nvidia一样主导CPU市场。
items.title_en: Arm’s stock shoots to best day in a year as an Nvidia-like chapter may be starting
items.summary_en: Arm could dominate the CPU market the way Nvidia has come to dominate the GPU market, an analyst says.

items.title: Arm跳涨16%，公司预计新芯片将带来收入风暴，这被认为是“重大转变”。
items.summary: Arm表示，预计其新芯片将在2031年产生的收入比2025年4亿美元高六倍。
items.title_en: Arm jumps 16% as company expects revenue windfall from new chip, a 'significant shift'
items.summary_en: Arm said it expects its new chip to generate six times more revenue in 2031 than the $4 billion it made in 2025.

items.title: 洛杉矶陪审团裁定Meta、YouTube在社交媒体成瘾案中负有疏忽之责。
items.summary: 一场专注于Meta和YouTube的洛杉矶案件的陪审团做出了裁决，这场案件专家们称之为社交媒体的"大烟草"时刻。
items.title_en: Jury in Los Angeles finds Meta, YouTube negligent in social media addiction trial
items.summary_en: A jury reached a verdict in the LA trial focused on Meta and YouTube, a case that experts have characterized as social media's "Big Tobacco" moment.

items.title: 新墨西哥州寻求修改Meta的平台规则，理由是陪审团裁定该公司有责任。
items.summary: 新墨西哥州检察长拉乌尔·托雷斯计划在案件下一阶段要求算法和设计变更、年龄验证和独立验证。
items.title_en: New Mexico seeking changes to Meta's platform after jury finds company liable
items.summary_en: New Mexico Attorney General Raúl Torrez plans to ask for algorithm and design changes, age verification and independent verification in the trial's next phase.

items.title: 微软的多元化首席官即将离职，公司正在进行“人工智能驱动的转型”。
items.summary: 微软正致力于开发顶级人工智能模型和产品，吸引和留住顶级人才变得越来越重要。
items.title_en: Microsoft's diversity chief is leaving as company continues 'AI-powered transformation'
items.summary_en: Hiring and retaining top talent is becoming more critical as Microsoft seeks to develop top-class artificial intelligence models and products.

items.title: 研究机构的另一项大胆预测出炉
items.summary: Citrini Research表示，持续高涨的能源价格可能会对消费者和企业利润造成压力，给股市带来困难的背景。
items.title_en: The research firm whose AI paper knocked the whole stock market is out with another big call
items.summary_en: Citrini Research said persistently high energy prices risk weighing on consumers and corporate earnings, creating a tough backdrop for equities.

items.title: 法律AI初创公司Harvey在融资轮次中估值11亿美元，投资人在模型公司之外扩大押注。
items.summary: 哈维将使用其新资金扩大其人工智能代理和法律工程团队。
items.title_en: Legal AI startup Harvey valued at $11 billion in funding round, as VCs spread bets beyond model companies
items.summary_en: Harvey will use its fresh capital to expand its AI agents and grow its embedded legal engineering teams.

items.title: 马克·扎克伯格重启人工智能计划，前Meta高管巴拉(Hugo Barra)重返公司
items.summary: 胡戈·巴拉在第一次加入Meta时，公司正大力推进VR领域。现在他回归，重点转向人工智能代理。
items.title_en: Hugo Barra's return to Meta 5 years after exit underscores Zuckerberg's AI urgency
items.summary_en: During Hugo Barra's first stint at Meta, the company was pushing heavily into VR. Now, he's back and the focus is AI agents.

items.title: Meta因违反新墨西哥州法律而必须支付3750万美元的赔偿，陪审团做出裁决
items.summary: 新墨西哥州案件的陪审团做出裁决，州检察长指控Meta未能保护其应用家族免受儿童猎手的侵害。
items.title_en: Meta must pay $375 million for violating New Mexico law in child exploitation case, jury rules
items.summary_en: Jury reaches a verdict in New Mexico trial in which the state's attorney general alleged that Meta failed to safeguard its family of apps from child predators.

items.title: Meta在股权期权上下了“大赌注”，以应对人工智能领域的压力。
items.summary: Meta正在为高管授予股票期权，随着公司在人工智能战役中的压力加剧。
items.title_en: Meta makes 'big bet' on top leaders with stock options as pressure builds to catch up in AI
items.summary_en: Meta is granting stock options to top executives as pressure on the company intensifies in the AI battle.

items.title: Arm 股价上涨6%，首席执行官哈斯预计新芯片将带来15亿美元的收入
items.summary: Arm推出了其首款内部芯片，于周二在旧金山举行了发布活动，Meta是首批客户。
items.title_en: Arm stock pops 6% as CEO Haas issues $15 billion revenue expectation for new chip
items.summary_en: Arm unveiled its first in-house chip on Tuesday at an event in San Francisco, with Meta as the initial customer.

items.title: 亚马逊收购人机交互机器人制造商Fauna Robotics
items.summary: Fauna的第一款产品，名为Sprout，是一款售价50,000美元的三脚走路机器人，身高3英尺6英寸，设计为“亲和性强且人性化”。
items.title_en: Amazon acquires 'approachable' humanoid maker Fauna Robotics
items.summary_en: Fauna's first product, called Sprout, is a $50,000 bipedal robot that's 3 feet, 6 inches tall and designed to be "approachable and human-friendly."

items.title: OpenAI关闭短视频应用Sora，公司在控制成本方面取得进展

items.title_en: OpenAI shutters short-form video app Sora as company reels in costs
items.summary_en: OpenAI said it's closing Sora, the short-form video app that went viral after its launch six months ago

items.summary_en: The spike in U.S. mortgage rates since the Iran war began in late February has been dashing hopes for an affordability boost ahead of the spring home-buying season.

items.title: 随着三月狂欢赛的进行，纽约联邦储备银行（NY Fed）指出体育投注对消费者信贷健康的冲击
items.summary: 随着体育投注的流行和限制的减少，根据纽约联邦储备银行的最新报告，消费者信贷健康状况正在恶化。
items.title_en: As March Madness unfolds, NY Fed highlights sports betting toll on consumer credit health
items.summary_en: As sports gambling becomes more popular and less restricted, consumer credit health is suffering, according to a new report by the New York Fed.

items.title: Meta正在 Reality Labs、Facebook 和其他部门裁员数百人。
